scripts.//deploy:env: Host uses @cloudflare/vite-plugin, which selects the wrangler env at BUILD time via CLOUDFLARE_ENV (it strips env blocks from its generated config), so `wrangler deploy --env` does NOT work here. VITE_APP_VERSION sets the wrangler --tag AND is baked into the build (import.meta.env.VITE_APP_VERSION).
scripts.deploy:qa: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=qa npm run build && wrangler deploy --tag "${VITE_APP_VERSION:?set VITE_APP_VERSION (e.g. VITE_APP_VERSION=v1.2.3)}"
scripts.deploy:prod: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=prod npm run build && wrangler deploy --tag "${VITE_APP_VERSION:?set VITE_APP_VERSION (e.g. VITE_APP_VERSION=v1.2.3)}"
